title: Fix state transition crash on playback_start trigger
description: Add safety checks to ensure playback_started is only called when the state machine is in the PREPARING_AUDIO state in orchestrator.py fallback playback loops, avoiding InvalidTransitionErrors.

title: Phase 3.5: Implement Tool Confirmation and Safety Approval Flow
description: Introduce an approval/confirmation layer inside ToolRegistry and Orchestrator. Categorize tools by risk level. Intercept medium/high risk commands to ask the user for confirmation (voice/UI) before execution, continuing on yes and canceling/logging on no.

title: [Epic] Phase 3.5 — Voice UX Hardening
description: Strengthen the core voice assistant architecture for natural turn-taking, barge-in, observability, safety, and error recovery.

title: Logging & debugging tools
description:
Why: Improve developer diagnostics and troubleshooting of audio streams, LLM calls, and state transitions.
What:
- Implement persistent file logging for all events, transcriptions, and API calls.
- Build a diagnostic panel in the frontend React app to inspect recent WebSocket logs.

title: Error handling & graceful degradation
description:
Why: Provide robust fallbacks when APIs or tools fail, and notify user gracefully in the UI instead of freezing.
What:
- Handle tool failures gracefully by returning an error message to the LLM.
- Implement UI alerts/toasts for connection losses (WebSocket server/client disconnects).
- Gracefully fall back to text response if TTS synthesis fails.

title: [Epic] Phase 3 — Polish & Extended Tools
description:
Why: Finalize the MVP with a polished user experience, settings UI, onboarding wizard, error handling, and robust tools.
What:
- Edge-TTS integration (replacing ElevenLabs)
- Graceful error handling and connectivity fallbacks
- Conversation mode (follow-up window)
- Extended toolset (weather, notes, calendar, reminders)
- Settings UI and onboarding setup flow
- Diagnostic logging tools
Milestone: Production-ready experience.

title: P7: Implement Persistent Voice Session Engine
description: Add VoiceEngine abstraction and a persistent speech-to-speech engine class (such as Gemini Live) for smooth server-side VAD, streaming audio responses, and built-in barge-in. For detailed specs, read improvement.md.

title: P4: Implement TurnContext and Turn Cancellation on Barge-in
description:
Implement full, reliable turn cancellation:
1. Create a TurnContext class tracking turn ID, active cancel event, reference to active tasks (LLM, TTS, playback, tools), and metadata.
2. Intercept and drop callbacks, state transitions, audio packets, and UI emissions if their turn_id does not match the active current_turn.
3. Implement cancel_current_turn() to immediately halt active LLM streams, TTS tasks, tool loops, clear audio player queues, and start mic listening on barge-in.
4. Allow user speech to trigger immediate turn cancellation even during non-speaking stages like THINKING and PREPARING_AUDIO.
For detailed specs, read improvement.md.
notes:
Ringkasan: Implementasi pembatalan per-turn untuk barge-in sudah ditambahkan di backend. Tidak ada layar, sidebar, tombol, menu, atau layout UI baru. Perubahan perilaku muncul di permukaan interaksi suara yang sudah ada: saat pengguna melakukan barge-in, teks asisten/audio/tool callback dari turn lama dicegah agar tidak muncul atau diputar setelah turn baru dimulai.

Lokasi perilaku yang perlu ditinjau: interaksi suara utama/voice conversation yang sudah ada, khususnya saat aplikasi sedang THINKING, PREPARING_AUDIO, atau SPEAKING dan pengguna mulai berbicara/menekan hotkey lagi.

Panduan uji manual:
1. Jalankan aplikasi dan mulai satu percakapan suara yang memicu respons LLM streaming.
2. Saat status masih berpikir atau sebelum audio mulai, tekan hotkey/mulai bicara lagi untuk barge-in. Pastikan turn lama berhenti dan aplikasi masuk listening tanpa teks jawaban lama yang menyusul.
3. Ulangi saat audio asisten sedang disiapkan atau diputar. Pastikan audio lama berhenti/bersih cepat dan tidak ada potongan audio lama yang diputar setelah listening baru aktif.
4. Uji prompt yang memicu tool lambat, lalu lakukan barge-in sebelum tool selesai. Pastikan hasil tool lama tidak muncul sebagai callback/teks asisten.
5. Lakukan percakapan normal tanpa barge-in untuk memastikan streaming LLM, TTS, tool, debug logging, dan memory tetap berjalan seperti sebelumnya.

Uji otomatis yang sudah dijalankan: `cd backend && poetry run pytest` -> 225 passed; `cd frontend && npm run build` -> berhasil.
